data.title: Polymarket Resolves Rockets vs. Lakers Game 4 Market with Significant Profits for Top Buyers
data.description: Polymarket has concluded its market on the Rockets vs. Lakers Game 4, following the Rockets' victory. According to NS3.AI, the top two buyers of Rockets victory shares have collectively earned over $440,000 in profit. These two addresses had initially invested approximately $600,000 in shares predicting the Rockets' win.

data.title: Hyperliquid's Significant Growth in Decentralized Trading
data.description:
Hyperliquid has reported an annual revenue of $820 million, ranking fourth globally in perpetual contract trading volume, according to ChainCatcher. This positions Hyperliquid as one of the few decentralized platforms capable of competing with centralized exchanges. In the decentralized perpetual contract sector, Hyperliquid is projected to hold 41% of the open interest share and over 30% of the total trading volume by 2025.

Additionally, the platform has launched over 120 new markets linked to real-world assets in less than six months, including tokenized stocks and commodities, averaging about five new markets per week. Bitcoin Suisse highlights that Hyperliquid's order book design and native blockchain architecture are key differentiators. The introduction of HyperEVM and capital-efficient trading mechanisms are expected to support further expansion, setting a new standard for decentralized trading platforms.

data.title: FLOA Launches Core AI Suite FloaClaw for Advanced Users
data.description:
FLOA has officially launched its core AI suite, FloaClaw, which is now fully available and introduces a multi-scenario AI skill matrix. According to ChainCatcher, this development is accessible only to Agents at level 3 and above, marking a significant advancement for FLOA in the integration of AI and Web3.

FloaClaw, as a central AI tool within the FLOA ecosystem, requires users to adhere to specific guidelines. Users must recharge BNB to acquire computing power tokens, with skill consumption increasing based on task complexity. The suite will continue to evolve, offering new AI skills and tool modules. Additionally, a creator dividend system will be implemented, allowing Agent creators to share in the computing power token revenue generated by user skill consumption. This system supports seamless BNB withdrawal, fostering a sustainable creator economy.

data.title: AI Infrastructure Investment Surpasses Global Oil and Gas Spending
data.description: The International Energy Agency (IEA) has reported that combined capital expenditure by five leading technology companies exceeded $400 billion last year, surpassing global spending on oil and natural gas production. According to NS3.AI, the IEA projects that this investment could increase by another 75% this year, driven by the expansion of data center development.

data.title: FloaClaw officially launched, upgrading the AI ​​capabilities of the FLOA ecosystem.
data.description: FloaClaw, the core AI suite of the FLOA ecosystem, has been officially launched and is now fully available. It also features a multi-scenario AI skill matrix, but its functionality is only accessible to Agents at Level 3 and above. As the core AI tool of the FLOA ecosystem, FloaClaw's use follows clear rules: users must deposit BNB to obtain computing power tokens (word units), with skill consumption increasing with task complexity. FloaClaw will continue to iterate and expand, opening up more new AI skills and tool modules, while also promoting a creator profit-sharing system. This allows Agent creators to share in the computing power token (word unit) revenue consumed by users' skills, and supports one-click exchange and withdrawal of BNB, building a sustainable creator economic closed loop. FLOA is the intelligent Web3 Agent ecosystem platform of the BNB Chain ecosystem, integrating core capabilities such as data analysis and on-chain automation. It features an open incentive mechanism, serving as both a user empowerment tool and a highly efficient Web3 ecosystem growth engine.

data.title: A suspected APE insider increased their long LDO positions, bringing the total to $4.58 million.
data.description: According to Lookonchain monitoring, suspected APE insiders have further increased their long positions in LDO, currently holding 10.26 million LDO long positions, with a position value of approximately $4.58 million.

data.title: Obama Responds to White House Correspondents' Dinner Shooting
data.description: Former U.S. President Barack Obama addressed the recent shooting incident at the White House Correspondents' Dinner in a statement released this morning. According to ChainCatcher, Obama emphasized that while the motives behind the shooting remain unclear, it is crucial to reject the notion that violence has any place in a democracy. He also highlighted the bravery and sacrifice demonstrated daily by U.S. Secret Service agents.

data.title: Understanding Unipeg: Uniswap v4 Hooks and On-Chain Dynamic NFTs
data.description: Unipeg is a dynamic NFT created through Uniswap v4 hooks, generating unicorn images based on trading behavior. According to PANews, the price of these NFTs once exceeded $1,000, sparking a trend that bridges the gap between NFTs and DeFi.

data.title: Bitcoin's Gradual Rise Amid US-Iran Tensions
data.description: Bitcoin continued its gradual climb toward $80,000 on Monday. According to Bloomberg, this movement comes as investors assess the ongoing developments in the US-Iran standoff over the Strait of Hormuz.

data.title: Game 4 of the NBA Western Conference First Round playoffs has concluded, with the top two Rockets-holding addresses earning over $440,000 in a single game.
data.description: According to Odaily Seer, the outcome of Polymarket's prediction event for Game 4 of the Western Conference First Round of the NBA Playoffs (Rockets vs. Lakers) has been confirmed: the Rockets won the game. The top two addresses that bet on a Rockets victory made a combined profit of over $440,000. Odaily Seer previously reported that the two addresses collectively bet approximately $600,000 on a Rockets victory. Specifically, the top account bought 625,975.3 shares at an average price of 56.1¢, while the top account bought 423,414.2 shares at an average price of 59¢. Odaily Seer continues to monitor the prediction market, anticipating changes before pricing.

data.title: Brent Crude Surpasses $100 Amid Geopolitical Tensions
data.description: On April 27, Phillip Nova analyst Priyanka Sachdeva reported that Brent crude oil prices have exceeded $100 per barrel, signaling tightening supply. According to Jin10, geopolitical instability continues to contribute to a 'war premium,' with transportation through the Strait of Hormuz remaining restricted. The lack of progress in U.S.-Iran negotiations has heightened concerns about prolonged disruptions in Middle Eastern oil supply. Sachdeva noted that diplomatic setbacks are making the market more sensitive to geopolitical news rather than traditional supply and demand fundamentals. She warned that if oil prices continue to rise towards $110 to $120 per barrel, the downside risks to global economic growth could increase, particularly for economies reliant on oil imports.

data.title: BTC Short Position Faces Liquidation Risk Amid Price Surge
data.description:
On April 27, Hyperinsight reported that a significant BTC short position on the Hyperliquid platform is nearing forced liquidation. According to BlockBeats On-chain Detection, the address starting with 0xbac is closest to liquidation, with a liquidation price set at $80,929.

Last night at 22:00 UTC+8, the whale opened a BTC short position with 40x leverage, just before the current price surge began, contrary to market trends. The position now stands at 175 BTC, with a total value of approximately $13.8 million, and an average entry price of $77,915. The unrealized loss has reached 54%.

data.title: Iran and Oman will continue expert-level consultations on the Strait of Hormuz.
data.description: Iranian Foreign Minister Araqchi: Iran and Oman have reached an agreement to continue expert-level consultations on the Strait of Hormuz. (Jinshi)

data.title: Ethereum spot ETFs saw a net inflow of $155 million last week, marking three consecutive weeks of net inflows
data.description: According to Odaily citing SoSoValue data, during the trading week (Eastern Time April 20 to April 24), Ethereum spot ETFs recorded a net inflow of $155 million.The Ethereum spot ETF with the highest net inflow last week was Blackrock’s ETHA, with a weekly net inflow of $138 million, bringing its historical total net inflow to $11.97 billion. This was followed by Blackrock’s ETHB, which saw a weekly net inflow of $60.9053 million, with its historical total net inflow reaching $456 million.The Ethereum spot ETF with the largest net outflow last week was Grayscale’s Ethereum Trust ETHE, with a weekly net outflow of $49.2393 million, bringing its historical total net outflow to $5.25 billion.As of press time, the total net asset value of Ethereum spot ETFs stands at $13.79 billion, with the ETF net asset ratio (market cap relative to Ethereum's total market cap) at 4.91%, and the historical cumulative net inflow has reached $12.00 billion.

data.title: Binance Offers SHELL Simple Earn Promotion with Up to 35% APR
data.description:
According to the announcement from Binance, the platform has introduced a new promotion for SHELL Simple Earn Flexible Products. During the promotion period from 2026-04-28 00:00:00 (UTC) to 2026-07-26 23:59:59 (UTC), users subscribing to SHELL Flexible Products can earn up to 35% APR. This includes a Bonus Tiered APR on top of Real-Time APR rewards.

The subscription format is on a first-come, first-served basis. Bonus Tiered APR rewards are distributed daily to users' Spot Accounts, starting the day after accrual begins. Real-Time APR is accrued and accumulated in users' Earn Accounts every minute. The SHELL Flexible Product offers a 35% APR, which includes a 30% Bonus Tiered APR and approximately 5% Real-Time APR. The minimum subscription limit per user is 0.1 SHELL, while the maximum is 1,000,000 SHELL.

To participate, users must complete identity verification during the promotion period. Only master accounts qualify for both Bonus Tiered APR and Real-Time APR rewards, while sub-accounts are not eligible for Bonus Tiered APR rewards. Users are responsible for understanding any regional restrictions on accessing Binance services.

Real-Time APR rewards are subject to change and are accrued every minute. Bonus Tiered APR rewards start accruing the day after subscription and are distributed the following day. Redemption of Flexible Products will halt the accrual of Bonus Tiered APR rewards for that day. Users can view their rewards history in the Earn History section.

data.title: Vietnam Increases LNG Imports Amid Global Supply Constraints Due to Iran Conflict
data.description: Vietnam is ramping up its imports of liquefied natural gas (LNG) at higher prices as the ongoing conflict in Iran disrupts global supply chains. Bloomberg posted on X that the country is preparing for above-average temperatures in the coming weeks, which is driving the increased demand for energy resources. The geopolitical tensions have led to a tightening of LNG supplies worldwide, impacting prices and availability. As Vietnam anticipates rising temperatures, the need for reliable energy sources becomes more pressing, prompting the nation to secure additional LNG imports despite the elevated costs. This situation underscores the broader challenges faced by countries reliant on energy imports amid geopolitical instability.

data.title: He Yi responded to rumors about YZiLabs' investment: Her original intention was to refer to Chinese-owned AI startups, but it has been over-interpreted.
data.description: He Yi responded on the X platform, stating that her previous remarks regarding YZiLabs' investment were intended to refer to "Chinese-owned AI companies," and that the content had been over-interpreted. Earlier reports indicated that He Yi stated YZiLabs had invested in a Chinese AI large-scale model company, leading to market speculation that it might be related to Kimi's parent company, Moonshadow.

data.title: U.S. President Trump Discusses Cryptocurrency and Policy at Mar-a-Lago Luncheon
data.description:
On April 25, U.S. President Donald Trump attended a luncheon at Mar-a-Lago, where he delivered a speech lasting approximately 45 minutes. According to Odaily, the topics covered included the cryptocurrency industry, the Iran conflict, and President Joe Biden.

White House correspondent Sander Lutz reported that Trump expressed his desire for the CLARITY Act to be passed and indicated he would sign it immediately. However, he did not provide further specific details, leaving some industry insiders hoping for more information on this significant legislation for the crypto sector.

data.title: Bitcoin spot ETFs saw a net inflow of $824 million last week, marking four consecutive weeks of net inflows
data.description: According to Odaily citing SoSoValue data, last week's trading days (April 20 to April 24, Eastern Time) saw a net inflow of $824 million into Bitcoin spot ETFs.The Bitcoin spot ETF with the largest net inflow last week was BlackRock's ETF IBIT, with a weekly net inflow of $733 million. IBIT's total historical net inflow now stands at $65.37 billion. The second was the Ark & 21Shares ETF ARKB, with a weekly net inflow of $59.6 million, bringing its total historical net inflow to $1.61 billion.The Bitcoin spot ETF with the largest net outflow last week was Grayscale's Bitcoin Trust GBTC, with a weekly net outflow of $59.01 million. GBTC's total historical net outflow has now reached $26.22 billion.As of press time, the total net asset value of Bitcoin spot ETFs is $102.64 billion, with the ETF net asset ratio (market value as a percentage of Bitcoin's total market cap) reaching 6.60%. The cumulative historical net inflow has reached $58.23 billion.

data.title: STOCKS | SK Hynix Shares Rise by 7%
data.description: SK Hynix shares continued their upward trend, increasing by 7%. According to Jin10, the South Korean semiconductor company has seen a notable rise in its stock price, reflecting positive investor sentiment.
